data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All AC met: (1) shim-refs-check hook wired in .pre-commit-config.yaml with 5s timeout via pre-commit-wrapper.sh; (2) files: ^plugins/dso/ filter set (check-shim-refs.sh internally excludes plugins/dso/scripts/); (3) matching entry added to examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml; (4) portability-check added to example (was missing, flagged by hook-drift); (5) hook-drift simulation PASS; (6) both files valid YAML
